data.content: Implemented a dedicated execution-plan generation path for POST /api/plans that resolves explicit beats, builds execution-plan-native prompt context, and runs the planner subprocess directly without orchestration-session storage. Added unit coverage for the new generator and the persistence manager seam. Verification: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build. Branch: worktree-foolery-dd18-execution-plan-path
